tree.text: Past perfect | I had done (过去完成时)

children.text: Timeline: Talk about things that happened before a starting point in the past (表示在过去某个起点或事件之前发生的事情)
Structure: had + past participle (gone / seen / finished / broken etc.) (构成：had + 过去分词)
Negative: hadn't done; Question: Had you done? (否定用 hadn't，疑问将 had 提到主语前)
Past Perfect vs Present Perfect: had seen (before a past point) vs have seen (up to now) (过去完成时表示过去之前 vs 现在完成时表示持续到现在)
Past Perfect vs Past Simple: had left (already gone before arrival) vs left (left after arrival) (过去完成时表示在过去某事之前已发生 vs 一般过去时表示过去发生的动作)
Verbs (动词): arrive (到达) / realise (意识到) / arrange (安排) / offer (提供) / break down (出故障)
Nouns & Adjs (名代形): flat (公寓) / doorbell (门铃) / mistake (错误) / nervous (紧张的) / surprise (惊讶)
When Sarah arrived at the party, Paul had already gone home. (当萨拉到达派对时，保罗已经回家了。)
When we got home last night, we found that somebody had broken into the flat. (昨晚我们到家时，发现有人闯入了公寓。)
At first I thought I'd done the right thing, but I soon realised that I'd made a big mistake. (起初我以为做对了，很快我就意识到犯了大错。)
The people sitting next to me on the plane were nervous. They hadn't flown before. (坐在我旁边的人很紧张，他们以前没坐过飞机。)
